treatment_information.treatment_response: Left breast, erythema and induration have greatly improved. Dressing is clean/dry/intact. Bed of wound is clean with pink granulation tissue.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: IV medication; specific antibiotics not mentioned.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to the ED with worsening left breast pain.

patient_outcome.final_status: Improvement noted with left breast condition.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to follow up with her outpatient doctor.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Safe to be discharged; continue antibiotics and dressing changes as prescribed.
